case_title: BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, L.L.C. A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. WILLIAM ELLIOTT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, L.L.C. A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, WILLIAM AKA WILLIAM E. ELLIOTT $79,838.54 PRINCIPAL, $7,119.97 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $87,328.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
